arguments.old_string:
package main

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"net"
	"strings"
	"testing"
	"time"

	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/auth"
	authtoken "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/auth/method/token"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/sql/sqlite"
	authsql "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/auth/sql"
	oplocksql "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/oplock/sql"
	pb "go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt"
	authrpc "go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/auth"
	"go.uber.org/zap"
	"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest"
	"google.golang.org/grpc"
	"google.golang.org/grpc/credentials/insecure"
	"google.golang.org/grpc/metadata"
	"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/timestamppb"

	// SQLite driver
	_ "github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3"
)

// TestRegression covers two authentication bugs:
// 1. Cookie-based tokens are not extracted from HTTP cookies
// 2. Authentication middleware is enforced on all servers with no per-server bypass
func TestRegression(t *testing.T) {
	// Set up in-memory SQLite database for testing
	db, err := sqlite.Open("file::memory:")
	require.NoError(t, err)
	defer db.Close()

	logger := zaptest.NewLogger(t)
	defer logger.Sync()

	// Create and run migrations
	migrator := sqlite.NewMigrator(db, logger)
	err = migrator.Up(false)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	// Create stores
	authStore := authsql.NewStore(sqlite.SQLite, &sqlite.Conn{DB: db}, logger)
	operationLockService := oplocksql.New(logger, sqlite.SQLite, &sqlite.Conn{DB: db})

	// Create initial token for testing
	clientToken, _, err := authStore.CreateAuthentication(
		context.Background(),
		&struct {
			Method    authrpc.Method
			ExpiresAt *timestamppb.Timestamp
			Metadata  map[string]string
		}{
			Method: authrpc.Method_METHOD_TOKEN,
		},
	)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.NotEmpty(t, clientToken)

	// Start gRPC server with authentication middleware enabled
	lis, err := net.Listen("tcp", "127.0.0.1:0")
	require.NoError(t, err)
	defer lis.Close()

	grpcServer := grpc.NewServer(
		grpc.UnaryInterceptor(auth.UnaryInterceptor(logger, authStore)),
	)
	defer grpcServer.Stop()

	// Register the Flipt service
	fliptServer := server.New(logger, authStore)
	pb.RegisterFliptServer(grpcServer, fliptServer)

	// Register auth services
	authServer := auth.NewServer(logger, authStore)
	authrpc.RegisterAuthenticationServiceServer(grpcServer, authServer)

	tokenServer := authtoken.NewServer(logger, authStore)
	authrpc.RegisterAuthenticationMethodTokenServiceServer(grpcServer, tokenServer)

	// Start server in background
	go grpcServer.Serve(lis)

	// Connect client
	conn, err := grpc.Dial(lis.Addr().String(), grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials()))
	require.NoError(t, err)
	defer conn.Close()

	client := authrpc.NewAuthenticationMethodTokenServiceClient(conn)
